scripts.begin-project: npx supabase start && npx supabase db reset --local && start "supabase-register-user" /B cmd /c "npx supabase functions serve register_user --no-verify-jwt" && timeout /t 5 /nobreak > nul && cd .. && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\bootstrap-users.ps1 && node .\client\scripts\post-bootstrap-seed.mjs
